name: design-system-ai
description: UI libraries PoC - compare Shadcn, Hero UI, DaisyUI, MUI for internal projects

scripts.start:prod: pnpm build:docs && concurrently -n mui,hero,styled,radix,shadcn,daisy,caddy "pnpm dev:mui" "sleep 1.5 && pnpm dev:hero-ui" "sleep 3 && pnpm dev:styled-base" "sleep 4.5 && pnpm dev:shadcn-radix" "sleep 6 && pnpm dev:shadcn-ui" "sleep 7.5 && pnpm dev:daisyui" "sleep 9 && pnpm serve:prod"
